profiles.description: VS Code GitHub Copilot workspace baseline with shared skills, custom agents, prompts, instructions, and multi-agent workflow system.
notes: Best default for VS Code GitHub Copilot workspace installs.
Includes the multi-agent workflow system (Coordinator, Planner, hooks, etc.).
Research-oriented expansions remain opt-in via additional components.

profiles.description: Minimal safe workflow baseline for supported targets.
notes: Use this when you want only shared skills and the target adapter.
Host-specific prompts and agents are not included unless the target profile adds them.

profiles.description: Copilot baseline plus research-oriented knowledge packs and the docs researcher agent.
notes: Use when primary-source documentation lookup and web-backed research matter.
External web access remains an explicit runtime choice in VS Code.
